payload.answer: The new fact appears to update Sam’s employment status from working at Goldman to having left Goldman and joined Point72, which may supersede the existing fact if both refer to the same Sam.
citations: Existing current fact - Sam works at Goldman

evidence.new_fact: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72
evidence.reason: The new fact indicates a job change away from Goldman, so it conflicts with the current employment fact and may supersede it if the same person is meant.
